Label: Statement
Description: A reified RDF statement representing a single biomedical assertion as a subject-predicate-object triple. Statements attach provenance to each relationship via dc:source, naming the evidence the assertion was derived from (PubMed literature and/or MIMIC clinical records).

Label: Entity
Description: A biomedical entity normalized to a UMLS concept (CUI), such as a gene, protein, chemical or drug, disease or sign/symptom, anatomical structure, biological process, or social determinant of health. Entities are the nodes connected by the graph's biomedical relationships and carry a Biolink category (UMLS semantic type) and a human-readable label.

Label: source
Description: Provenance of a reified statement, naming the evidence source(s) the assertion was derived from, such as PubMed literature or MIMIC clinical data.

Label: object
Description: The entity in the object position of a reified biomedical statement.

Label: predicate
Description: The relationship type (a biomedical predicate IRI) asserted by a reified statement.

Label: subject
Description: The entity in the subject position of a reified biomedical statement.

Label: label
Description: A human-readable name for an entity.

Label: administered to
Description: The subject (a substance or treatment) is administered to the object organism or population.

Label: complicates
Description: The subject complicates the object condition or process.

Label: converts to
Description: The subject converts to the object.

Label: location of (specimen)
Description: A specimen-specific variant asserting the subject is the anatomical site or source of the object.

Label: measurement of
Description: The subject is a measurement of the object.

Label: measures
Description: The subject (a test or instrument) measures the object.

Label: method of
Description: The subject is a method used in the object procedure or process.

Label: negated administered to
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not administered to the object.

Label: negated affects
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not affect the object.

Label: negated associated with
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not is associated with the object.

Label: negated augments
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not augment the object.

Label: negated causes
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not cause the object.

Label: negated coexists with
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not coexist with the object.

Label: negated complicates
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not complicate the object.

Label: negated converts to
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not convert to the object.

Label: negated diagnoses
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not diagnose the object.

Label: negated disrupts
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not disrupt the object.

Label: negated inhibits
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not inhibit the object.

Label: negated interacts with
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not interact with the object.

Label: negated isa
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not is a the object.

Label: negated location of
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not is the location of the object.

Label: negated manifestation of
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not is a manifestation of the object.

Label: negated measurement of
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not is a measurement of the object.

Label: negated measures
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not measure the object.

Label: negated method of
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not is a method of the object.

Label: negated occurs in
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not occur in the object.

Label: negated part of
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not is part of the object.

Label: negated precedes
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not precede the object.

Label: negated predisposes
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not predispose to the object.

Label: negated prevents
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not prevent the object.

Label: negated process of
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not is a process of the object.

Label: negated produces
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not produce the object.

Label: negated stimulates
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not stimulate the object.

Label: negated treats
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not treat the object.

Label: negated uses
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not use the object.

Label: negated higher than
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not is higher than the object.

Label: negated lower than
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not is lower than the object.

Label: negated same as
Description: A negated assertion stating that the subject does not is the same as the object.

Label: occurs in
Description: The subject process or condition occurs in the object population, location, or context.

Label: process of
Description: The subject biological process is a process of the object organism.

Label: produces
Description: The subject produces the object.

Label: stimulates
Description: The subject stimulates the object.

Label: uses
Description: The subject uses the object.

Label: compared with
Description: The subject is compared with the object.

Label: higher than
Description: The subject measurement or value is higher than the object.

Label: lower than
Description: The subject measurement or value is lower than the object.

Label: same as
Description: The subject is equivalent to the object.

Label: affects
Description: Asserts that the subject entity has a causal or modulatory effect on the object entity.

Label: associated with
Description: A general statistical or biological association between two entities.

Label: category
Description: The Biolink category / UMLS semantic type assigned to an entity.

Label: causes
Description: Asserts that the subject entity causes the object entity, such as a condition or effect.

Label: coexists with
Description: Asserts that two entities co-occur or are found together.

Label: decreases amount or activity of
Description: The subject decreases the amount or activity of the object entity.

Label: diagnoses
Description: The subject (e.g. a test or finding) is used to diagnose the object condition.

Label: disrupts
Description: The subject disrupts the normal function or structure of the object.

Label: increases amount or activity of
Description: The subject increases the amount or activity of the object entity.

Label: interacts with
Description: The subject physically or functionally interacts with the object.

Label: location of
Description: The subject (an anatomical structure or location) is the site of the object.

Label: manifestation of
Description: The subject is an observable manifestation of the object condition or process.

Label: part of
Description: The subject is a structural or conceptual part of the object.

Label: precedes
Description: The subject temporally precedes the object in a process or sequence.

Label: predisposes to condition
Description: The subject increases susceptibility to the object condition.

Label: preventative for condition
Description: The subject helps prevent the object condition.

Label: subclass of
Description: The subject entity is a more specific type of the object entity.

Label: treats
Description: The subject (e.g. a drug or therapy) treats the object disease or condition.
